name: Cassandra Felton

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Elusive
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

abilities.name: Prep The Stage
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, it may drain a (t) to choose a marker within 6" and make a friendly copy of it anywhere within 6".

actions.name: Heart-Stealer
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model chooses whether this action is resisted by Df or Wp.

triggers.name: Lonely Heart
triggers.text: Enemy only. Choose a different enemy model in the target's LoS. The chosen model gains an Entranced token.

actions.name: Breath of Fire
actions.effects: Deal this action's damage to a different enemy model within 2" of the target. Models damaged by this action gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Staged
triggers.text: This model gains a Backtrack token.

actions.name: Upstage
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Non-leader ally only. This model may remove a Decoy marker within 1" of itself. Select one tactical action printed on the target's card. This model may declare the selected action, which cannot declare triggers. If this model removed a Decoy marker, the generated action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Close-Up Magic
triggers.text: Make a Decoy marker in base contact with the target.

extraction_notes: Heart-Stealer resist value is 'X', which represents player choice between Df or Wp as stated in costs_and_restrictions
